creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

has there been any progress with this issue? Someone will have to provide
a patch for the port to be updated.

"ranma42": If you are interested in updating the port, but just lack the
experience, the Porter's Handbook [1] is a good place to start.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/index.html
